name: dart-references
description: Displays the number of references for Dart and Flutter in VSCode

dartReferences.enable.description: Enable or disable the display of reference counts in Dart files.

dartReferences.referencesLabel.description: Label for the number of references displayed next to Dart functions, classes, methods, constructors, variables, and enums.

dartReferences.zeroReferencesLabel.description: Label displayed when there are no references found for a Dart functions, classes, methods, constructors, variables, and enums.

dartReferences.cacheMaxEntries.description: Maximum number of symbols whose reference counts are cached (least-recently-used entries are evicted first). Set 0 for no limit.

dartReferences.maxCachedLocations.description: Reference lists longer than this are cached as a count only; clicking the lens re-fetches the locations. Keeps hot symbols in large monorepos from holding big location lists in memory. Set 0 for no limit.

dartReferences.cacheTtlSeconds.description: Seconds a cached reference count stays valid (any Dart file save also clears the cache). Set 0 to keep entries until the next save.

scripts.pretest: npm run compile && npm run lint
